title: Classic Redstone Torch
description: A resource pack to restore the redstone torch texture to what it was before Minecraft snapshot 24w33a
body:
# Overview
Classic Redstone Torch exists to simply restore the origional redstone torch texture that we all know and love back to the game. That's it!

## Comparison
![Comparison of the new and restored redstone textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5d62ef1172b2dcd4f8c6ad0654a103701795b1c.png)
